author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit ec6bbe1. ReplaceCount enum on Op::Replace (All default, FirstPerLine, FirstInFile, Max(n)); wire format all/first_per_line/first_in_file/{max:n}. Matcher::replace_n(text, replacement, limit) returns (text, occurrences). Engine threads a file-wide occurrence budget through the per-line loop — partial-line consumption works (line with 3 occurrences + budget 2 replaces exactly 2); multiline mode truncates spans; FirstPerLine+multiline rejected at engine, JSON validation, and script parse. CLI --first/--first-in-file/--max-replacements with clap mutual exclusion; 0 rejected at parse. JSON count rejected on non-replace ops via the op-kind-gated extra-map check ('all' tolerated). Schema oneOf added; README updated. 28 new tests. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
